title: Init containers not working and starting the pods as it enters to exist status
body:
### Issue Description

The service at https://github.com/FNNDSC/ChRIS-in-a-box/blob/main/quadlet/chris/cube.yml wont start as expected while running as quadlet using podman built from scratch

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Start the service at https://github.com/FNNDSC/ChRIS-in-a-box/blob/main/quadlet/chris/cube.yml



### Describe the results you received

```
rhel8@localhost ~]$ sudo journalctl -xe
```

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out, @veniceofcode.

Can you please share the version of Podman you are using as requested in the issue template (i.e., paste the output of `podman info`)?
